wine_museums.name: Museu do Douro
wine_museums.address: Rua Marquês de Pombal, 5050-282 Peso da Régua, Portugal
wine_museums.description: The regional museum of the Douro Demarcated Region, opened 2008 in the 18th-century Casa da Companhia in Régua, tracing the history of Port and Douro viticulture.
wine_museums.admission: Permanent exhibition ticket around EUR 6; reduced and family rates available

verified.address_quoted: Rua Marquês do Pombal 5050-286 Peso da Régua

wine_museums.name: WOW (World of Wine)
wine_museums.address: Rua do Choupelo 39, 4400-088 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
wine_museums.description: A cultural district built from restored Port cellars in Gaia, housing seven museums including the Wine Experience and the Pink Palace rosé museum, plus a wine school.
wine_museums.admission: Single-museum ticket from around EUR 20; multi-museum passes available

verified.address_quoted: Rua do Choupelo, 39, 4400-088 Vila Nova de Gaia

wine_museums.name: Sandeman Museum-Cellar
wine_museums.address: Largo Miguel Bombarda 47, 4400-222 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
wine_museums.description: The Sandeman house museum inside the 1811 Gaia cellar, presenting the brand's history and the iconic caped Don alongside the working Port ageing cellar.
wine_museums.admission: Included with the guided cellar visit and tasting from around EUR 22

verified.address_quoted: Largo Miguel Bombarda, 3, 4400-222 Vila Nova de Gaia

wine_museums.name: Graham's 1890 Lodge Museum
wine_museums.address: Rua Rei Ramiro 514, 4400-281 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
wine_museums.description: The house museum within Graham's hilltop 1890 lodge, displaying the family archive, historic decanters and Vintage Port records alongside the working ageing cellar.
wine_museums.admission: Included with the guided lodge tour and tasting

verified.address_quoted: Rua Rei Ramiro, 514, 4400-281 Vila Nova de Gaia
